context: Evaluate whether the agent correctly identifies and fixes all three bugs in the broken base file: Duration.round() called without accessing a numeric field first, an undefined formula reference, and an unquoted colon in a displayName value.

checklist.name: Identifies Duration.round() bug
checklist.description: The agent correctly identifies that (now() - file.ctime).round(0) fails because date subtraction returns a Duration, not a Number, and .round() is not available on Duration.

checklist.name: Fixes Duration bug by accessing .days first
checklist.description: The corrected formula accesses a numeric field (e.g., .days) on the Duration before calling .round(0): (now() - file.ctime).days.round(0).

checklist.name: Identifies undefined formula.priority reference
checklist.description: The agent correctly identifies that formula.priority appears in properties and order but priority is not defined under formulas, causing the column to silently disappear.

checklist.name: Fixes undefined formula reference
checklist.description: The fix either adds a priority formula definition under formulas, or removes the formula.priority reference from properties and order.

checklist.name: Identifies unquoted colon in displayName
checklist.description: The agent correctly identifies that displayName: Status: Current is invalid YAML because the second colon is not inside a quoted string.

checklist.name: Fixes displayName quoting
checklist.description: The corrected displayName wraps the value in double quotes: displayName: "Status: Current".

checklist.name: Provides complete corrected file
checklist.description: The response includes a complete, syntactically valid YAML file that incorporates all three fixes without introducing new errors.
